items.title: The issue for the Fever isn't the missed shots; it's the turnovers, shot creation, and lack of FTAs. None in the 1Q.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
The issue for the Fever isn't the missed shots; it's the turnovers, shot creation, and lack of FTAs. None in the 1Q.

Still no FGs inside the arc.

Too much settling and forcing. Including 7TOs in the first 10mins.

media.title: The LIVE Giannis Antetokounmpo Stake Out: Heat or Celtics?
media.description: Per multiple reports, including primarily from ESPN, Giannis Antetokounmpo is expected to be traded before the NBA Draft to either the Boston Celtics or Miami Heat.   We'll discuss all the rumors, all the possibilities, and possibly react live to the deal if it goes done during the stream.   Bring your comments and your food/beverage of choice!  Follow Bryan on social media:   @BryanFonsecaNY on Twitter & Instagram @Bryanfonseca.bsky.social on BlueSky https://www.twitch.tv/bryanfonsecany

items.title: One year later, Pacers are still feeling the pain of what could have been
items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: About two hours before tip time on June 22, 2025, before Game 7 of the 2025 NBA Finals. This day, one year ago, began with so much promise. For fans and for the players. The possibility of the Indiana Pacers coming out on top, lifting the Larry O’Brien Trophy for the first time…

items.title: Hollinger POTD Mike James. Duquesne PG was undrafted in 98 played in Europe/CBA until sticking w/MIA in 02 as hustling defender. Finally started in 05-06 w/TOR & had 20 ppg. Parlayed that into a big contract w/MIN but reverted to backup right away. Played thru 2014 & now coaches.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Mike James. Duquesne PG was undrafted in 98 played in Europe/CBA until sticking w/MIA in 02 as hustling defender. Finally started in 05-06 w/TOR & had 20 ppg. Parlayed that into a big contract w/MIN but reverted to backup right away. Played thru 2014 & now coaches.

items.title: If you're building hypothetical Mo Diawara contracts, a 4-year deal using his non-Bird rights (starting at ~$2.6M) could be worth $11.2M total. Only other way to get above $10M total would be to sign him for two years via the non-taxpayer MLE and stay below the second apron.

items.body_excerpt: If you're building hypothetical Mo Diawara contracts, a 4-year deal using his non-Bird rights (starting at ~$2.6M) could be worth $11.2M total. Only other way to get above $10M total would be to sign him for two years via the non-taxpayer MLE and stay below the second apron.

items.title: I do not believe the Celtics will consider trading Jaylen if the Giannis deal falls through, even if he’s pissed. This is a rare chance to trade an excellent player for a better one, and one who fixes flaws. That almost certainly doesn’t exist in any other deal.
items.author: Chad Finn
items.body_excerpt: I do not believe the Celtics will consider trading Jaylen if the Giannis deal falls through, even if he’s pissed. This is a rare chance to trade an excellent player for a better one, and one who fixes flaws. That almost certainly doesn’t exist in any other deal.

items.title: The Bucks will reportedly keep Jaylen Brown if they choose the Celtics' offer. If they were in a position to build around him, Giannis wouldn't be leaving.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
The Bucks will reportedly keep Jaylen Brown if they choose the Celtics' offer. If they were in a position to build around him, Giannis wouldn't be leaving.

They should either flip Brown or take the Heat's offer. But what will they...1/2

items.title: New York Knicks updated salary cap situation.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
New York Knicks updated salary cap situation.

They can give Mohamed Diawara up to four years, $11.3 million with his Non Bird rights. His minimum over four years is $10.6 million.

They are still free to go above the second apron by re-signing their own free agents.
